title: Expand Ada authoritative implementation
description: Ada/SPARK packages and the Ada executable now serve as the authoritative implementation path for boot, catalog, logging, command, partition, platform, UVS, crypto-service, and VM policy semantics.

title: Define leaf C boundary
description: Document the exact VMX/SVM wrapper and tiny hardware-boundary functions that may remain in C.

title: Prepare C assurance pipeline
description: Define MISRA C compliance checks, static-analysis tooling, and formal-verification evidence requirements for retained C leaf code.

title: Split VMX policy from leaf wrappers
description: Move VM run-loop and exit-policy semantics out of legacy C vmx.c so only tiny hardware-boundary wrappers remain as candidates for retained C.

title: Move VM policy into Ada
description: Ada/SPARK now authoritatively owns VM execution policy, state transitions, and exit ABI code/length shaping; the remaining C vm_policy.c is explicitly a temporary mirror and no longer the authoritative policy source.

title: Implement Ada hypercall dispatcher
description: Added an Ada/SPARK dispatcher that routes selected frozen ABI call IDs through command sequencing, host callsite validation, logging, UVS, KCI, partition lifecycle, VM interrupt injection, VM run, and audit boot-id retrieval.

title: Model Ada memory policy
description: Added Ada/SPARK memory-object allocation/release, mapping-budget checks, permission validation, and W^X enforcement semantics with executable acceptance coverage.

title: Model KSI shadow policy
description: Added Ada/SPARK modeling for Tier B shadow-copy preparation, observed-RIP validation, paused-writer sequencing, short write-enable windows, and atomic replacement commits.

title: Extend diagnostic models
description: Added Ada/SPARK diagnostic modeling and dispatcher coverage for capability, partition, artifact, and device queries so more frozen ABI introspection leaves the legacy C path.

title: Expand memory dispatch surface
description: Selected MEMORY_ALLOCATE_OBJECT, MEMORY_MAP, MEMORY_SET_PERMISSION, MEMORY_RELEASE_OBJECT, and VM_MAP_MEMORY semantics now route through the Ada/SPARK dispatcher and memory policy so less ABI traffic depends on the legacy C path.

title: Extend control dispatch
description: Ada/SPARK dispatcher coverage now includes selected KCI control calls (`KCI_SET_WX`, `KCI_PIN_CR`, and `KCI_INTERCEPT_MSR`) in addition to module verification so more frozen-ABI control traffic leaves the legacy C path.

title: Extend partition and audit dispatch
description: Ada/SPARK dispatcher coverage now includes `PARTITION_GET_STATUS`, `PARTITION_QUIESCE`, `PARTITION_RESUME`, and `AUDIT_GET_MIRROR_INFO`, along with modeled partition-status and mirror-info results.

title: Extend vCPU status dispatch
description: Ada/SPARK dispatcher coverage now includes `VM_GET_VCPU_STATUS` so more vmm-facing VM control traffic leaves the legacy C path.

title: Extend memory sharing dispatch
description: Ada/SPARK dispatcher coverage now includes `MEMORY_UNMAP`, `MEMORY_REGISTER_SHARED`, and `MEMORY_UNREGISTER_SHARED`, with modeled shared-object and unmap semantics.

title: Extend VM register dispatch
description: Ada/SPARK dispatcher coverage now includes `VM_SET_REGISTER` and `VM_GET_REGISTER`, with modeled register permissions and frozen register IDs.

title: Extend crypto-service dispatch
description: Ada/SPARK dispatcher coverage now includes selected KSI, IKS, and SKS hypercalls so more security-service ABI traffic leaves the legacy C path.

title: Extend partition lifecycle dispatch
description: Ada/SPARK dispatcher coverage now includes `PARTITION_CREATE`, `PARTITION_DESTROY`, and `PARTITION_GET_FAULT_INFO`, with modeled trusted-service creation, tombstone destroy state, and stored fault-info results.

title: Retire Tier A plumbing
description: The earlier Tier A plumbing item has been retired as superseded by the user-directed Ada/SPARK-first architecture pivot and leaf-C-only boundary.
